title: triorchis beckii
intro: Triorchis beckii, also known as the 'Three-Stamen Orchid', is a species of orchid found in tropical and subtropical regions of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian Indigenous medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Triorchis beckii include its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Triorchis beckii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
